problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
